claim: Multi-lane computational assault found 0 counterexamples; best feasible d(f)=1 (unity extremal). Dual-ray/fast, extremal jet, squeeze, rich multiplicity, deep n<= 26, dual_fast n<= 30, and related lanes are consistent with a constrained maximum at d=1 in the attacked families. This is a wall ledger, not a disproof or a proof for new n.

lanes_closed.result: d=1 equality case for all tested n
r in (0.7,0.99) for n in {8,9,12-15,19,20,26}; local max below 1
n<=26 main strata rediscover r=1 only; CE=0
26775 samples; best feasible r<=0.99998; r>1 always infeasible; CE=0
min maxroot ~ 2R-1 > 1 for R>1; CE=0; table in dual_ray.json

best feasible gap_at_a ~0.75; CE=0

free complex beta penalty n=9..20 all r=1; dual R>1 always maxroot>1 when r>1; CE=0
n=9,10,12,15 heavier starts: delta=0 => r=1; delta>0 => r<1; CE=0

PROVED: equal-crit family p'=(z-c)^{n-1} has no Sendov CE for any n>=2 (geometry of roots-of-unity circle about c)
